data.name: HistoryLead
data.value: We created a place where ideas are born.

data.name: HistoryText
data.value: Coworking Space started with a simple idea: to provide freelancers and startups with a professional environment without long-term office lease obligations. Today we are home to over 200 residents.

data.name: MissionText
data.value: To provide every entrepreneur with tools for growth. We believe that the right environment accelerates business development by 2 times.

data.name: ValueOpenness
data.value: Openness: We are open to new ideas and people.

data.name: ValueGrowth
data.value: Growth: We support learning and development.
